/usr/bin/c++ -pthread CMakeFiles/dsm_demo.dir/dsm_demo.cu.o CMakeFiles/dsm_demo.dir/dummy.cu.o CMakeFiles/dsm_demo.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o dsm_demo   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/nvshmem/lib:/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib /usr/local/nvshmem/lib/libnvshmem_host.so.3.6.5 /usr/local/nvshmem/lib/libnvshmem_device.a /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi_cxx.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
